1. Bid for tile placement order
2. Place Tiles
3. Bribe & Place Irrigation
4. Extra Irrigation
5. Drought
6. Gain $3

info.name: Irrigation
info.attribution:
Layout, board, cards, design, coding , and library image by Jonathan Cox (email: Contact@GettingGames.com for inquiries) and released to the Public Domain under CC0.

Attribution for other icons are contained in the About overlay.

info.description: Auction to plant crops and bribe your way to irrigating them.
info.similarAwards:
2004 Tric Trac Nominee
2004 Tric Trac de Bronze
2004 International Gamers Awards - General Strategy; Multi-player Nominee
2003 Meeples Choice Award Winner
info.helpText:
Players take seats. Press the Setup button to begin.

Proceed through the phases of each round by clicking and dragging the sun token down. If a phase needs to be reset, remove the sun token and place it back onto that phase slot.

Detailed gameplay and usability information is found in tooltips that can be read by hovering over the phase text. Turn tooltips off by clicking the tooltip toggle button.

default.text-shadow: ${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowBlur}px ${PROPERTY color_text_shadow}, -${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowBlur}px ${PROPERTY color_text_shadow}, ${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px -${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowBlur}px ${PROPERTY color_text_shadow}, -${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px -${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowBlur}px ${PROPERTY color_text_shadow}

phase1.detail:
Phase 1: Bid for tile placement order
Begin by dragging 1 tile from the top of each stack onto the vertical holder to the right of the stacks.

In clockwise order, starting after the Overseer, make a bid of money that has not been made yet. Exception: multiple players can bid 0. The first player to bid 0 will become the new Overseer.

Proceed to the next phase by clicking and dragging the Sun token down to phase 2.

phase2.detail:
Phase 2: Place Tiles
In order from highest to lowest bid (from phase 1), select one face-up tile and place it on any empty location on the board. Farmer discs for that player will automatically be placed on the tan circles on the tile (1 or 2 discs).

If multiple people bid 0, the most recent 0 bidder goes first, and then the next-most-recent etc so that the first 0 bidder places last.

All players who bid 0 for turn order will automatically place one less farmer disc on their tile.

Proceed to the next phase by clicking and dragging the Sun token down to phase 3.

phase3.detail:
Phase 3: Bribe & Place Irrigation
In clockwise order, from player after Overseer, each player may offer a bribe. Do this by dragging your colored irrigation token out to any possible canal spot (branching from previous irrigation token or touching the Well). Click the +/- buttons to input the amount you are bribing to have the canal placed there. You can click and drag the bidding box out of the way to make it more visible if multiple bribes are placed on the same location.

Once all but the Overseer has had the opportunity to bribe, the Overseer places a canal. They do this by clicking the button under their name and then either take bribes or pay. To take bribes, click on all the player colors in the input box for those you are taking bribes from, and then click the green box to be paid the bribe. To place a different canal, type a number equal to 1 more than the highest collective bid into the bottom and click the green button to pay that much.

Once the bribe is accepted, or the Overseer pays, they drag an irrigation token from the Water Supply and place it on the canal location that was chosen.

Proceed to the next phase by clicking and dragging the Sun token down to phase 4.

phase4.detail:
Phase 4. Extra Irrigation
In clockwise order, from player after Overseer, players may place their extra irrigation token. Each player can only place one extra irrigation during the game, and it is found under their name in the lower part of the screen.

The extra irrigation token can be placed anywhere on the board that doesn't have an irrigation token AND is touching a previously placed irrigation token or the Well.

Only one extra irrigation token can be placed each round, so immediately after one is placed move on to phase 5 by dragging the Sun token down.

phase5.detail:
Phase 5: Drought
Every tile on the board that is not orthogonally touching an irrigation token suffers drought.

If the tile has any number of Farmer tokens on it, remove one Farmer token back to its supply. If the tile has no Farmer tokens on it, flip the tile over to its barren side.

Proceed to the next phase by clicking and dragging the Sun token down to phase 6.

phase6.detail:
Phase 6: Gain $3 Income
Each player automatically gains $3.

If there are still face-down tiles in the stacks then proceed to the next round by clicking and dragging the Sun token down to phase 4. Otherwise, the game ends.
